results.title: Meta's new AI model shows early promise, but investors want to see Zuckerberg's strategy
Meta debuts new AI model, attempting to catch Google, OpenAI after spending billions
Meta Platforms Inc Market share relative to its competitors, as of Q4 2025 - CSIMarket
Meta Competitors: META Top Rivals in 2026 | Hudson Labs

summary: Alphabet surged after Google Cloud AI beat expectations — positive for ad-tech sector broadly but highlights AI model gap vs META. OpenAI and Anthropic continue to lead in foundation models, pressuring Meta's Muse Spark. Snap growth stalled, giving Meta an opportunity with its new 'Instants' disappearing-photo app. Microsoft also reported strong earnings.
